description: PCIe completion delay causes a DMA timeout and reset failure.
spec: Network card with PCIe Gen4 x16, DMA descriptor rings, MSI-X interrupts, packet throughput, reset recovery, and telemetry.
logs:
INFO pcie: link trained Gen4 x16
INFO dma: descriptor rings initialized
WARN traffic: packet drop counter increased
ERROR dma: DMA timeout waiting for completion queue update qid=7
ERROR pcie: completion timeout observed replay counter increased
FAIL validation: reset recovery failed

description: Burst traffic saturates packet buffers and descriptor rings.
spec: Network card datapath shall tolerate burst traffic, packet buffer pressure, queue overflow recovery, descriptor rings, and packet drop monitoring.
logs:
INFO traffic: burst profile started
WARN buffer: ring full on rxq=3
ERROR buffer: queue overflow depth=4096
ERROR driver: descriptor leak suspected after completion
FAIL validation: packet loss above acceptance threshold

description: Firmware state machine enters watchdog loop after invalid rollback.
spec: Firmware loader validates images, supports rollback, reports boot-stage marker, and recovers from watchdog reset.
logs:
INFO fw: primary image validation started
WARN fw: rollback image mismatch
ERROR fw: firmware crash at boot stage CONTROL_READY
ERROR fw: watchdog reset loop detected
FAIL validation: firmware recovery failed

description: PHY margin issue causes CRC bursts and link retraining.
spec: PHY layer shall expose CRC counters, link retrain events, SerDes lane status, signal integrity telemetry, jitter, and eye margin.
logs:
INFO phy: lane status nominal
WARN phy: crc burst detected lane=4
WARN pcie: link retrain requested
ERROR phy: link flap observed after jitter spike
FAIL validation: link stability test failed

description: Thermal stress triggers throttling before throughput loss.
spec: Thermal monitoring shall warn at 85 C, throttle before shutdown, and recover after controlled airflow returns.
logs:
INFO traffic: line rate started
WARN thermal: temperature 88C warning threshold crossed
ERROR thermal: overheat throttle asserted
FAIL validation: throughput degraded during thermal stress

description: Core rail droop appears during load transition.
spec: Power delivery shall monitor voltage rails, brownout events, core voltage rail margin, power faults, and recovery behavior.
logs:
INFO power: load transition started
WARN power: core voltage rail droop observed
ERROR power: brownout interrupt asserted
FAIL validation: power fault during high-load transition

description: Ambiguous mixed thermal and power event used to test benchmark sensitivity.
spec: Card shall monitor thermal stress, power rail voltage, throttle behavior, and brownout recovery under sustained load.
logs:
WARN thermal: ASIC temperature 91C
WARN power: core voltage rail droop observed
ERROR thermal: throttle asserted
ERROR power: power fault latched after throttle
FAIL validation: sustained load test failed
